blockers: Analyst images are captured but no saved chart/heatmap reads exist yet.

Heatmap images have not been read into saved level/bias records yet.
2 duplicate Discord message ids are present in raw feed; replay skips them.

helpful_outputs: Luke can consume Kat replay summaries through /agent/kat/insights.
Discord users can query !kat status or !kat summary instead of waiting for rare confluence alerts.
Discord users can query !kat watchlist to see repeated non-index tickers under shadow review.
Discord users can query !kat equity TICKER or !kat options TICKER to inspect shadow equity/options evidence.
Luke can consume saved chart/heatmap reads through data/kat/vision-signals.jsonl and the kat_vision websocket payload.
The backtesting agent can use data/kat/derived/kat-index-replay.jsonl, data/kat/vision-signals.jsonl, and kat-spx-spy-evaluations.jsonl when it finishes its current lane.
next_actions: Import more SPX/SPY market bars covering the raw Kat date range so more than 114 direct signals can be scored.
Run historical image parsing for captured analyst chart and heatmap attachments; write every result to data/kat/vision-signals.jsonl by message_id and attachment_id.
Collect market data for the top non-index Kat watchlist symbols before scoring or recommending them.
Split analyst scorecards by ticker, time of day, signal type, and heatmap agreement before trusting any single aggregate win rate.
Add a scheduled Discord EOD summary only after the command-based summary is verified in the live server.

messages.raw_input: SPY 30min. First attempt to close the bear gap we left open yesterday. Will act as resistance. Good place to take some off
The cliche line here is no one goes broke taking profits. That's even truer with SPX plays if you do it long enough
whos shorting $spy a couple weeks out up here

$spx

second time to tag TL resistance
If SPX 5min bear flags here, expect lower comes. It's also dead money time so we can stay here for another couple hours
Alternatively, You could have gone long after the 8EMA (blue line) was reclaimed. Waiting for stronger confirmations reduces the chances of getting faked out
SPX 15min. Both EMAs reclaimed. Bullish EMA crossovers imminent. This is an example of what a reversal could look like for you
Crude oil Futures 1W. If you would long this here, it should give you pause in loading calls too heavily in equities especially tech

$iwm

breakdown continues, the gaps below look juicy from here

gaps are at 270, 265, 253

$spy

if peaking at this TL resistance

next target would be 698-690

below 690 can start opening the door to the large gap below at 660 imo
UNH 1W. It's only Tuesday but that 364 resistance has held for almost a year

asset_context.parse_note: Equity shadow context only; needs market data and scoring before recommendations.

messages.raw_input: You're not likely selling based on anything UPS does today lol

You have to develop your system for gauging a reversal. Is it the 5min/10min/15min reclaim of an EMA or the VWAP or bullish crossover of EMAs? Reversals often show something objective and measurable. Of course, you can always go with a hunch and vibes and try to pre-empt it and it works out.
main thing im in right now is $dia puts. and considering spy and or iwm puts for june as well

$spx

rising wedge cracked and back under TL resistance
